label: Leaked
description: Unverified information from leaked material or unofficial source.

label: Permit Filed
description: Permit, filing, or public record has appeared.

label: Officially Announced
description: Confirmed by Disney or another official source.

label: Construction Started
description: Visible construction or site work has begun.

label: Testing
description: Ride, show, venue, or system is being tested.

label: Opening Date Announced
description: Opening date or reopening date is known.

label: Reviews & Reactions
description: Reviews, first impressions, and community reactions are being published.

label: Closure Announced
description: A closure date has been announced.

label: Delayed
description: Opening, reopening, or planned event has been delayed.

label: Canceled
description: Project, event, or offering has been canceled.
